description_long: This is a compact, modern quadcopter drone with a sleek, matte black body and four extended arms, each supporting a single propeller. The central body is rectangular with subtle angular contours and a slightly raised top, likely housing the main electronics and battery. The front features a recessed area that may contain sensors or a camera, flanked by two small, circular details that resemble LED lights. The arms are thin and streamlined, with the rear right arm marked by a yellow band for orientation. The propellers are slim and aerodynamically shaped, attached to small motor housings at the end of each arm. The underside appears flat, with no visible skids or extended landing gear, suggesting the drone lands on its body or has minimal fixed legs. The overall design is utilitarian and optimized for urban aerial navigation, with a focus on portability and efficiency.
description: A sleek, matte black quadcopter drone with four extended arms, slim propellers, and a compact rectangular body. It features a recessed front section, likely for sensors or a camera, and a yellow band on one arm for orientation.
description_view_0: Front view showing the recessed front section, possible camera area, and symmetrical arm extension.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the flat underside, thin arms, and yellow band on the rear right arm.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back vent-like details and the full span of the arms and propellers.
description_view_3: Angled rear-side view emphasizing the streamlined body, arm structure, and propeller arrangement.
